docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHEN, LANQING AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND WING JOM MA WHO IS THE PLAINTIFF IN CASE NUMBER 823353 APPEARS ON HER BEHALF. DEFENDANT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. LING YU INTERPRETS ENGLISH TO CANTONESE, CANTONESE TO ENGLISH FOR WING JOM MA, PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, LANQING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED. EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES FOR CASE 823351 ALSO USED FOR RELATED CASE 823353. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: SHAWNA VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY
